title: GitHub Actions CI workflow for build, test, lint
description:
Write .github/workflows/ci.yml. Jobs: (1) fmt + clippy + deny, (2) test (cargo test --all-targets), (3) doc build (RUSTDOCFLAGS='--cfg docsrs -D warnings' cargo +nightly doc). Matrix: stable + MSRV (1.75).

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to research current GitHub Actions Rust action versions.

Test discipline: The test job must run with --all-targets so integration tests are included. No --features all shortcuts that bypass feature combinations.

Defensive programming: Cache ~/.cargo and target/ to avoid rebuilding deps. Fail fast on first error.
acceptance_criteria: CI passes on a clean commit; matrix includes stable and MSRV; doc build uses nightly
